ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "scheme" INTEGER /* Scheme under which the process is categorized */,
  "process_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the process */,
  "num_processes" INTEGER /* Total number of processes involved */,
  "num_threads" INTEGER /* Total number of threads utilized */,
  "time_per_process" REAL /* Time taken per process in seconds */,
  "delta_x" INTEGER /* Parameter for Delta X */,
  "delta_y" INTEGER /* Parameter for Delta Y */,
  "delta_t" REAL /* Time increment Delta T */,
  "s" REAL /* Parameter s (e.g., stability constant) */,
  "r_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the r parameter */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process ended */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the resource used for the process */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job submission */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the job */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., submitted, running, completed) */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated time when the job is expected to complete */,
  "actual_completion_time" TEXT /* Actual time when the job completed */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the resource used for the job */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_submissions_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_submissions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job submission linked to this metric */,
  "exec_time" REAL /* Execution time of the job in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during execution in MB */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage during execution */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage during the job execution in MB */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage during the job execution in MB */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the job execution in kWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_metrics_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES job_submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job submission that encountered the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error that occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES job_submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the process type (e.g., simulation, data processing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of process */,
  "required_resources" TEXT /* Description of the resources required for the process type */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time for processes of this type to complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process type this parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., DeltaX, DeltaY) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., FLOAT, INTEGER) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_parameters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES process_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that generated this result */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated by the process */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was generated */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., text, file, graph) */,
  "result_location" TEXT /* Location where the result is stored (e.g., file path, URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_results_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process scheduled for execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who scheduled the process */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time at which the process is scheduled to run */,
  "recurrence" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "estimated_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration of the process */,
  "actual_duration" REAL /* Actual duration of the process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_schedules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_schedules_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., node1, node2) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., CPU, GPU, storage) */,
  "total_memory" REAL /* Total memory available on the resource in MB */,
  "total_cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Total number of CPU cores available on the resource */,
  "total_gpu_cores" INTEGER /* Total number of GPU cores available on the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., available, busy, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)
